prompt: Order these milestones in women's history from earliest to latest

events.title: Seneca Falls Convention
events.fact: 1848 — first women's rights convention in the US

events.title: NZ grants women's suffrage
events.fact: 1893 — New Zealand becomes first country to grant vote

events.title: Marie Curie first Nobel
events.fact: 1903 — first woman to win Nobel Prize (Physics)

events.title: Amelia Earhart solo flight
events.fact: 1932 — first woman to fly solo across Atlantic

events.title: Margaret Thatcher PM
events.fact: 1979 — becomes first female UK Prime Minister

events.title: Kamala Harris sworn in
events.fact: 2021 — first female Vice President of the United States
